extension.description: v3.9.6: FULL FEATURES - Speed Optimizer, Scheduled Auto-Clean, RD/PM/AD/Trakt/TMDB Auth, IPTV Vault, Favourites Vault, USB Backup, Repair Tools, Cache and Package Cleaner.

Orion v3.2.2 - Complete media addon with multiple torrent scrapers (Torrentio, MediaFusion, Jackettio, Orionoid), Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid, TorBox, Trakt integration with scrobbling, watchlists and liked lists, ResolveURL support, watch history, favorites, Kids Zone, and auto-play next episode.
extension.news: [3.2.2] Fixed Real-Debrid resolving .rar files instead of videos - now selects only video files and skips archives. Added clear error dialog when no debrid service is configured. Added ResolveURL debrid fallback for magnets.

extension.summary: Stream All The Sources - Modernized for Kodi 21+
extension.description:
SALTS is a multi-source video addon with 34+ scrapers across torrent sites, streaming sources, anime trackers, and international sources.
Features: - Custom source dialog with quality breakdown - Up Next: auto-play next episode for TV series - Skip Intro prompt for TV episodes - Torrent Sites: 1337x, YTS, EZTV, TorrentGalaxy, TPB, NNM-Club, RuTracker, RuTor, Nyaa, etc. - Jackett/Prowlarr Integration: Connect to any indexer - Debrid Services: Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid - Trakt.tv: Watchlists, collections, scrobbling, history - ResolveURL for 270+ hosting sites
Revived and modernized by zeus768 for Kodi 21 Omega and above. Original author: tknorris Thank you to Mister X and Zaxxon709
extension.news:
v2.1.4 (2026) - Fixed: Debrid container refresh on authorisation.
v2.1.3 (2026) - Fixed: AllDebrid authorisation.
v2.1.2 (2026) - Fixed: Busy spinner on playback.
v2.1.1 (2026) - Fixed: Replaced setResolvedUrl with xbmc.Player().play() to prevent rescrape loop - Fixed: Trakt API now uses native urllib (no more requests dependency crash) - Added: Custom source dialog showing source/scraper count and quality breakdown - Added: Up Next - auto-play next episode for TV series - Added: Skip Intro prompt during first 90 seconds of TV episodes - Removed: repository.gujal from repo
v2.1.0 (2026) - Added 34+ scrapers including Russian, Chinese, Anime sources - Fixed TMDB integration with native urllib
v2.0.0 (2026) - Complete rewrite for Kodi 21+ (Python 3) - Added modern torrent scrapers - Added Jackett integration - Added Real-Debrid, Premiumize, AllDebrid support

extension.summary: Strike Zone by zeus768 - Watch Fight Replays
extension.description:
Watch UFC, MMA, Boxing, Kickboxing, and more fight replays. Features include:
- Auto-scrape all categories from FullFightReplays
- Infinite scroll pagination
- Search functionality
- Local favourites
- Fight metadata and thumbnails
- Multiple video sources with ResolveURL
- Custom category images support
extension.disclaimer: This addon does not host any content. All videos are third-party links available free on the Internet.

extension.description:
Zeus768's Kodi Addon Repository.
Available Addons: - SALTS (Stream All The Sources) - 35+ scrapers, Free Streams, Autoplay, Up Next, Skip Intro, Trakt, Debrid Support - Orion - Torrent and Usenet Indexer - Strike Zone - Sports Streaming Add-on - The Accountant - Kodi Maintenance and Debrid Management Tool - ResolveURL - URL Resolver Module
